summary: Frontend testing completed for POS Caisse Pro - Historique tab and server validated invoices features. All 6 requested features verified working correctly. One backend fix was applied to ensure servers see ALL validated invoices (not just their own).

fixed.issue: Servers could only see their own validated invoices instead of ALL validated invoices
fixed.fix: Modified query logic in get_invoices() to return server's pending invoices + ALL validated invoices

frontend_issues.note: Invoice detail modal shows 'Ticket 80mm' and 'PDF A4' buttons for all users including servers. This is acceptable as it allows viewing/downloading the final validated invoice.

passed_tests: ✅ FEATURE 1: L'onglet 'Historique' existe et affiche un calendrier (date picker) pour sélectionner la date
✅ FEATURE 2: L'historique affiche uniquement les factures validées (filtered by validation_status === 'validated')
✅ FEATURE 3: Le serveur voit la section 'FACTURES DÉFINITIVES DU JOUR' avec toutes les factures validées (backend fixed)
✅ FEATURE 4: Le serveur ne peut que 'Voir' les factures - bouton 'Voir' only, pas d'Imprimer/Modifier dans la liste principale
✅ FEATURE 5: Le badge '✓ Définitive' apparaît sur les factures validées pour les serveurs
✅ FEATURE 6: Changer la date dans l'historique charge les factures de cette date (date picker triggers fetchHistoryInvoices)

test_credentials.admin_login: Bouton 'Admin' puis mot de passe: Caisse2026

seed_data_creation: Used existing validated invoice EM-20260308-0004 for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Historique tab verified: shows only validated invoices with date picker. Server view verified: FACTURES DÉFINITIVES DU JOUR section shows all validated invoices with read-only 'Voir' button. Backend fix applied to ensure servers see ALL validated invoices (not just their own). Invoice EM-20260308-0004 is validated (Christian, 8300F).

backend_fix.description: For servers: returns their own pending invoices + ALL validated invoices
